mapper.select:
SELECT h.EMP_CODE AS empCode, h.EMP_NAME AS empName, h.DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, d.DEPT_NAME AS deptName, ISNULL(s.SHIFT_CODE, '') AS workPlanCode, ISNULL(s.SHIFT_NAME, '미설정') AS workPlanName, CASE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) WHEN 'WEEKDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'ANYDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'WEEKEND' THEN 'OFF' ELSE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) END AS workDayType, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), s.WORK_ON_HHMM, 108), 5) AS shiftOnTime, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), s.WORK_OFF_HHMM, 108), 5) AS shiftOffTime, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), s.BREAK1_START_HHMM, 108), 5) AS break1StartHhmm, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), s.BREAK1_END_HHMM, 108), 5) AS break1EndHhmm, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), s.BREAK2_START_HHMM, 108), 5) AS break2StartHhmm, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), s.BREAK2_END_HHMM, 108), 5) AS break2EndHhmm, CASE WHEN CASE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) WHEN 'WEEKDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'ANYDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'WEEKEND' THEN 'OFF' ELSE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) END IN ('OFF', 'HOLIDAY') THEN 0 WHEN s.WORK_ON_HHMM IS NOT NULL AND s.WORK_OFF_HHMM IS NOT NULL THEN (CASE WHEN s.WORK_OFF_HHMM >= s.WORK_ON_HHMM THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, s.WORK_ON_HHMM, s.WORK_OFF_HHMM) ELSE 1440 + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, s.WORK_ON_HHMM, s.WORK_OFF_HHMM) END - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, s.BREAK1_START_HHMM, s.BREAK1_END_HHMM), 0) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, s.BREAK2_START_HHMM, s.BREAK2_END_HHMM), 0)) ELSE 0 END AS plannedWorkMin, ar.WORK_MIN AS actualWorkMin, weekly.weekWorkMin AS shiftWorkMin, weeklyReq.activeWeeklyRequestEffectMin + weeklyActualAdj.weekActualAdjustmentMin AS activeWeeklyRequestEffectMin, COALESCE(NULLIF(ar.ACTUAL_SHIFT_CODE, ''), NULLIF(ar.SHIFT_CODE, ''), '') AS actualWorkCode, ISNULL(actualShift.SHIFT_NAME, '') AS actualWorkName, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), ar.CHECK_IN, 108), 5) AS checkIn, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), ar.CHECK_OUT, 108), 5) AS checkOut, ar.OVERNIGHT_YN AS overnightYn, r.REQ_ID AS requestId, r.REQ_GROUP AS existingRequestGroup, CASE WHEN r.REQ_GROUP = 'OTHER' THEN o.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE ELSE r.REQ_TYPE END AS requestWorkCode, r.REASON AS reason, r.REASON_DETAIL AS reasonDetail, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.START_TIME, 108), 5) AS startTime, ISNULL(g.START_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') AS startTimeType, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.END_TIME, 108), 5) AS endTime, ISNULL(g.END_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') AS endTimeType, g.WORK_MIN AS requestWorkMin, r.STATUS AS status, r.REQUESTER_EMP_CODE AS requesterCode, re.EMP_NAME AS requesterName FROM HRIMASTER01 h LEFT JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 d ON h.COMPANY = d.COMPANY AND h.DEPT_CODE = d.DEPT_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 pm ON d.COMPANY = pm.COMPANY AND d.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE LEFT JOIN ( SELECT COMPANY, WORK_PATTERN_CODE, COUNT(*) AS CYCLE_LEN FROM HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 GROUP BY COMPANY, WORK_PATTERN_CODE ) pdcount ON pm.COMPANY = pdcount.COMPANY AND pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pdcount.WORK_PATTERN_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 pd ON pm.COMPANY = pd.COMPANY AND pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pd.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pd.SEQ = ( (DATEDIFF(DAY, pm.START_DATE, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) % pdcount.CYCLE_LEN + pdcount.CYCLE_LEN) % pdcount.CYCLE_LEN + 1 ) LEFT JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON pd.COMPANY = s.COMPANY AND pd.SHIFT_CODE = s.SHIFT_CODE OUTER APPLY ( SELECT ISNULL(SUM(daily.WORK_MIN), 0) AS weekWorkMin FROM ( SELECT DATEADD(DAY, days.n, DATEADD(DAY, -((DATEDIFF(DAY, 0, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) % 7 + 7) % 7), CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE))) AS WORK_DATE FROM (VALUES(0),(1),(2),(3),(4),(5),(6)) AS days(n) ) wd INNER JOIN HRIDEPTTRANSFER01 wtr ON wtr.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND wtr.EMP_CODE = h.EMP_CODE AND wtr.START_DATE <= wd.WORK_DATE AND (wtr.END_DATE IS NULL OR wtr.END_DATE >= wd.WORK_DATE) INNER JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 wdept ON wdept.COMPANY = wtr.COMPANY AND wdept.DEPT_CODE = wtr.DEPT_CODE INNER JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 wpm ON wpm.COMPANY = wdept.COMPANY AND wpm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = wdept.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND wpm.USE_YN = 'Y' INNER JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 wpd ON wpd.COMPANY = wpm.COMPANY AND wpd.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = wpm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND wpd.SEQ = ( (DATEDIFF(DAY, wpm.START_DATE, wd.WORK_DATE) % wpm.CYCLE_COUNT + wpm.CYCLE_COUNT) % wpm.CYCLE_COUNT + 1 ) INNER JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 ws ON ws.COMPANY = wpd.COMPANY AND ws.SHIFT_CODE = wpd.SHIFT_CODE CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE ISNULL(wpd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(ws.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) WHEN 'WEEKDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'ANYDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'WEEKEND' THEN 'OFF' ELSE ISNULL(wpd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(ws.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) END AS WORK_DAY_TYPE ) day_type OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP 1 oto.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 otr JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 oto ON oto.COMPANY = otr.COMPANY AND oto.REQ_ID = otr.REQ_ID WHERE otr.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND otr.TARGET_EMP_CODE = h.EMP_CODE AND otr.TARGET_DATE = wd.WORK_DATE AND otr.REQ_GROUP = 'OTHER' AND otr.STATUS IN ('DRAFT', 'SUBMITTED', 'APPROVED') ) oReq LEFT JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 ows ON ows.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND ows.SHIFT_CODE = oReq.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE WHEN oReq.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE IS NOT NULL THEN CASE WHEN ows.WORK_ON_HHMM IS NULL OR ows.WORK_OFF_HHMM IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN ows.WORK_OFF_HHMM >= ows.WORK_ON_HHMM THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, ows.WORK_ON_HHMM, ows.WORK_OFF_HHMM) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, ows.BREAK1_START_HHMM, ows.BREAK1_END_HHMM), 0) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, ows.BREAK2_START_HHMM, ows.BREAK2_END_HHMM), 0) ELSE 1440 + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, ows.WORK_ON_HHMM, ows.WORK_OFF_HHMM) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, ows.BREAK1_START_HHMM, ows.BREAK1_END_HHMM), 0) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, ows.BREAK2_START_HHMM, ows.BREAK2_END_HHMM), 0) END WHEN ws.WORK_ON_HHMM IS NULL OR ws.WORK_OFF_HHMM IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN ISNULL(day_type.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '') IN ('OFF', 'HOLIDAY') THEN 0 WHEN ws.WORK_OFF_HHMM >= ws.WORK_ON_HHMM THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, ws.WORK_ON_HHMM, ws.WORK_OFF_HHMM) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, ws.BREAK1_START_HHMM, ws.BREAK1_END_HHMM), 0) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, ws.BREAK2_START_HHMM, ws.BREAK2_END_HHMM), 0) ELSE 1440 + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, ws.WORK_ON_HHMM, ws.WORK_OFF_HHMM) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, ws.BREAK1_START_HHMM, ws.BREAK1_END_HHMM), 0) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, ws.BREAK2_START_HHMM, ws.BREAK2_END_HHMM), 0) END AS WORK_MIN ) daily ) weekly OUTER APPLY ( SELECT ISNULL(SUM( CASE WHEN wr.REQ_TYPE IN ('연장', '조출연장', '휴일근무') THEN CASE WHEN ISNULL(wg.WORK_MIN, 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL(wg.WORK_MIN, 0) ELSE 0 END WHEN wr.REQ_TYPE IN ('조퇴', '외근', '외출', '오전반차', '오후반차') THEN -ISNULL(wg.WORK_MIN, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS activeWeeklyRequestEffectMin FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 wr JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 wg ON wr.COMPANY = wg.COMPANY AND wr.REQ_ID = wg.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRTDAILYATTENDANCE01 war ON war.COMPANY = wr.COMPANY AND war.EMP_CODE = wr.TARGET_EMP_CODE AND war.YYYYMMDD = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), wr.TARGET_DATE, 112) CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISNULL(wg.START_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') = 'N1' THEN 1440 ELSE 0 END + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), wg.START_TIME) AS REQ_START_MIN, CASE WHEN ISNULL(wg.END_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') = 'N1' THEN 1440 ELSE 0 END + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), wg.END_TIME) AS REQ_END_MIN ) reqRange CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE WHEN war.CHECK_IN IS NULL OR war.CHECK_OUT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), war.CHECK_IN) END AS ACTUAL_START_MIN, CASE WHEN war.CHECK_IN IS NULL OR war.CHECK_OUT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CASE WHEN ISNULL(war.OVERNIGHT_YN, 'N') = 'Y' THEN 1440 ELSE 0 END + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), war.CHECK_OUT) END AS ACTUAL_END_MIN ) actualRange CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE WHEN actualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN IS NULL OR actualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN IS NULL OR reqRange.REQ_END_MIN <= actualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN OR actualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN <= reqRange.REQ_START_MIN THEN 0 ELSE CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN reqRange.REQ_END_MIN < actualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN THEN reqRange.REQ_END_MIN ELSE actualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN END) - (CASE WHEN reqRange.REQ_START_MIN > actualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN THEN reqRange.REQ_START_MIN ELSE actualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN END) > 0 THEN (CASE WHEN reqRange.REQ_END_MIN < actualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN THEN reqRange.REQ_END_MIN ELSE actualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN END) - (CASE WHEN reqRange.REQ_START_MIN > actualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN THEN reqRange.REQ_START_MIN ELSE actualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN END) ELSE 0 END END AS OVERLAP_MIN ) actualOverlap WHERE wr.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND wr.TARGET_EMP_CODE = h.EMP_CODE AND wr.TARGET_DATE BETWEEN DATEADD(DAY, -((DATEDIFF(DAY, 0, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) % 7 + 7) % 7), CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) AND DATEADD(DAY, 6, DATEADD(DAY, -((DATEDIFF(DAY, 0, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) % 7 + 7) % 7), CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE))) AND wr.STATUS IN ('DRAFT', 'SUBMITTED', 'APPROVED') AND wr.REQ_GROUP = 'GENERAL' ) weeklyReq OUTER APPLY ( SELECT ISNULL(SUM(dayAdj.ADJ_MIN), 0) AS weekActualAdjustmentMin FROM ( SELECT DATEADD(DAY, days.n, DATEADD(DAY, -((DATEDIFF(DAY, 0, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) % 7 + 7) % 7), CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE))) AS WORK_DATE FROM (VALUES(0),(1),(2),(3),(4),(5),(6)) AS days(n) ) awd INNER JOIN HRIDEPTTRANSFER01 awtr ON awtr.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND awtr.EMP_CODE = h.EMP_CODE AND awtr.START_DATE <= awd.WORK_DATE AND (awtr.END_DATE IS NULL OR awtr.END_DATE >= awd.WORK_DATE) INNER JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 awdept ON awdept.COMPANY = awtr.COMPANY AND awdept.DEPT_CODE = awtr.DEPT_CODE INNER JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 awpm ON awpm.COMPANY = awdept.COMPANY AND awpm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = awdept.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND awpm.USE_YN = 'Y' INNER JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 awpd ON awpd.COMPANY = awpm.COMPANY AND awpd.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = awpm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND awpd.SEQ = ( (DATEDIFF(DAY, awpm.START_DATE, awd.WORK_DATE) % awpm.CYCLE_COUNT + awpm.CYCLE_COUNT) % awpm.CYCLE_COUNT + 1 ) INNER JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 awps ON awps.COMPANY = awpd.COMPANY AND awps.SHIFT_CODE = awpd.SHIFT_CODE OUTER APPLY ( SELECT TOP 1 awoto.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 awotr JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 awoto ON awoto.COMPANY = awotr.COMPANY AND awoto.REQ_ID = awotr.REQ_ID WHERE awotr.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND awotr.TARGET_EMP_CODE = h.EMP_CODE AND awotr.TARGET_DATE = awd.WORK_DATE AND awotr.REQ_GROUP = 'OTHER' AND awotr.STATUS IN ('DRAFT', 'SUBMITTED', 'APPROVED') ) awoReq LEFT JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 aws ON aws.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND aws.SHIFT_CODE = ISNULL(awoReq.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE, awps.SHIFT_CODE) LEFT JOIN HRTDAILYATTENDANCE01 awa ON awa.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND awa.EMP_CODE = h.EMP_CODE AND awa.YYYYMMDD = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), awd.WORK_DATE, 112) CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE ISNULL(awpd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(aws.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) WHEN 'WEEKDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'ANYDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'WEEKEND' THEN 'OFF' ELSE ISNULL(awpd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(aws.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) END AS WORK_DAY_TYPE ) awDayType CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE WHEN aws.WORK_ON_HHMM IS NULL OR aws.WORK_OFF_HHMM IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN ISNULL(awDayType.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '') IN ('OFF', 'HOLIDAY') THEN 0 WHEN aws.WORK_OFF_HHMM >= aws.WORK_ON_HHMM THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, aws.WORK_ON_HHMM, aws.WORK_OFF_HHMM) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, aws.BREAK1_START_HHMM, aws.BREAK1_END_HHMM), 0) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, aws.BREAK2_START_HHMM, aws.BREAK2_END_HHMM), 0) ELSE 1440 + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, aws.WORK_ON_HHMM, aws.WORK_OFF_HHMM) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, aws.BREAK1_START_HHMM, aws.BREAK1_END_HHMM), 0) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, aws.BREAK2_START_HHMM, aws.BREAK2_END_HHMM), 0) END AS PLAN_WORK_MIN, CASE WHEN aws.WORK_ON_HHMM IS NULL OR aws.WORK_OFF_HHMM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), aws.WORK_ON_HHMM) END AS PLAN_START_MIN, CASE WHEN aws.WORK_ON_HHMM IS NULL OR aws.WORK_OFF_HHMM IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CASE WHEN aws.WORK_OFF_HHMM >= aws.WORK_ON_HHMM THEN 0 ELSE 1440 END + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), aws.WORK_OFF_HHMM) END AS PLAN_END_MIN ) awPlan CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE WHEN awa.CHECK_IN IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), awa.CHECK_IN) END AS ACTUAL_START_MIN, CASE WHEN awa.CHECK_IN IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN awa.CHECK_OUT IS NULL AND awPlan.PLAN_END_MIN IS NOT NULL THEN awPlan.PLAN_END_MIN WHEN awa.CHECK_OUT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CASE WHEN ISNULL(awa.OVERNIGHT_YN, 'N') = 'Y' OR DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), awa.CHECK_OUT) < DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), awa.CHECK_IN) THEN 1440 ELSE 0 END + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), awa.CHECK_OUT) END AS ACTUAL_END_MIN ) awActualRange CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE WHEN awActualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN IS NULL OR awPlan.PLAN_START_MIN IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN awActualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN > awPlan.PLAN_START_MIN THEN awActualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN ELSE awPlan.PLAN_START_MIN END AS WORK_START_MIN, CASE WHEN awActualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN IS NULL OR awPlan.PLAN_END_MIN IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN awActualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN < awPlan.PLAN_END_MIN THEN awActualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN ELSE awPlan.PLAN_END_MIN END AS WORK_END_MIN ) awClip CROSS APPLY ( SELECT (CASE WHEN aws.BREAK1_START_HHMM IS NULL OR aws.BREAK1_END_HHMM IS NULL OR awClip.WORK_START_MIN IS NULL OR awClip.WORK_END_MIN IS NULL OR awClip.WORK_END_MIN <= awClip.WORK_START_MIN THEN 0 ELSE CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN aws.BREAK1_END_HHMM >= aws.BREAK1_START_HHMM THEN 0 ELSE 1440 END + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), aws.BREAK1_END_HHMM)) <= awClip.WORK_START_MIN OR awClip.WORK_END_MIN <= DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), aws.BREAK1_START_HHMM) THEN 0 ELSE (CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN aws.BREAK1_END_HHMM >= aws.BREAK1_START_HHMM THEN 0 ELSE 1440 END + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), aws.BREAK1_END_HHMM)) < awClip.WORK_END_MIN THEN CASE WHEN aws.BREAK1_END_HHMM >= aws.BREAK1_START_HHMM THEN 0 ELSE 1440 END + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), aws.BREAK1_END_HHMM) ELSE awClip.WORK_END_MIN END) - (CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), aws.BREAK1_START_HHMM) > awClip.WORK_START_MIN THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), aws.BREAK1_START_HHMM) ELSE awClip.WORK_START_MIN END) END END) + (CASE WHEN aws.BREAK2_START_HHMM IS NULL OR aws.BREAK2_END_HHMM IS NULL OR awClip.WORK_START_MIN IS NULL OR awClip.WORK_END_MIN IS NULL OR awClip.WORK_END_MIN <= awClip.WORK_START_MIN THEN 0 ELSE CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN aws.BREAK2_END_HHMM >= aws.BREAK2_START_HHMM THEN 0 ELSE 1440 END + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), aws.BREAK2_END_HHMM)) <= awClip.WORK_START_MIN OR awClip.WORK_END_MIN <= DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), aws.BREAK2_START_HHMM) THEN 0 ELSE (CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN aws.BREAK2_END_HHMM >= aws.BREAK2_START_HHMM THEN 0 ELSE 1440 END + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), aws.BREAK2_END_HHMM)) < awClip.WORK_END_MIN THEN CASE WHEN aws.BREAK2_END_HHMM >= aws.BREAK2_START_HHMM THEN 0 ELSE 1440 END + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), aws.BREAK2_END_HHMM) ELSE awClip.WORK_END_MIN END) - (CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), aws.BREAK2_START_HHMM) > awClip.WORK_START_MIN THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), aws.BREAK2_START_HHMM) ELSE awClip.WORK_START_MIN END) END END) AS BREAK_MIN ) awBreak OUTER APPLY ( SELECT ISNULL(SUM(reqEffect.EFFECT_MIN), 0) AS REQUEST_EFFECT_MIN FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN awr.REQ_TYPE IN ('연장', '조출연장', '휴일근무') THEN CASE WHEN ISNULL(awg.WORK_MIN, 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL(awg.WORK_MIN, 0) ELSE 0 END WHEN awr.REQ_GROUP = 'GENERAL' THEN -CASE WHEN ISNULL(awg.WORK_MIN, 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL(awg.WORK_MIN, 0) ELSE awPlan.PLAN_WORK_MIN END ELSE 0 END AS EFFECT_MIN FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 awr JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 awg ON awg.COMPANY = awr.COMPANY AND awg.REQ_ID = awr.REQ_ID WHERE awr.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND awr.TARGET_EMP_CODE = h.EMP_CODE AND awr.TARGET_DATE = awd.WORK_DATE AND awr.REQ_GROUP = 'GENERAL' AND awr.STATUS IN ('DRAFT', 'SUBMITTED', 'APPROVED') ) reqEffect ) awExpectedReq OUTER APPLY ( SELECT ISNULL(SUM(actualEffect.EFFECT_MIN), 0) AS ACTUAL_EFFECT_MIN FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN awar.REQ_TYPE IN ('연장', '조출연장', '휴일근무') THEN CASE WHEN awa.CHECK_OUT IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN awActualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN IS NULL OR awActualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN awReqRange.REQ_START_MIN IS NULL OR awReqRange.REQ_END_MIN IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN awReqRange.REQ_END_MIN <= awActualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN OR awActualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN <= awReqRange.REQ_START_MIN THEN 0 WHEN (CASE WHEN awReqRange.REQ_END_MIN < awActualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN THEN awReqRange.REQ_END_MIN ELSE awActualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN END) - (CASE WHEN awReqRange.REQ_START_MIN > awActualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN THEN awReqRange.REQ_START_MIN ELSE awActualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN END) > ISNULL(awag.WORK_MIN, 0) THEN ISNULL(awag.WORK_MIN, 0) ELSE (CASE WHEN awReqRange.REQ_END_MIN < awActualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN THEN awReqRange.REQ_END_MIN ELSE awActualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN END) - (CASE WHEN awReqRange.REQ_START_MIN > awActualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN THEN awReqRange.REQ_START_MIN ELSE awActualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN END) END ELSE -CASE WHEN ISNULL(awag.WORK_MIN, 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL(awag.WORK_MIN, 0) ELSE awPlan.PLAN_WORK_MIN END END AS EFFECT_MIN FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 awar JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 awag ON awag.COMPANY = awar.COMPANY AND awag.REQ_ID = awar.REQ_ID CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE WHEN awag.START_TIME IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CASE WHEN ISNULL(awag.START_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') = 'N1' THEN 1440 ELSE 0 END + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), awag.START_TIME) END AS REQ_START_MIN, CASE WHEN awag.END_TIME IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CASE WHEN ISNULL(awag.END_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') = 'N1' THEN 1440 ELSE 0 END + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), awag.END_TIME) END AS REQ_END_RAW_MIN ) awReqRaw CROSS APPLY ( SELECT awReqRaw.REQ_START_MIN AS REQ_START_MIN, CASE WHEN awReqRaw.REQ_START_MIN IS NULL OR awReqRaw.REQ_END_RAW_MIN IS NULL THEN awReqRaw.REQ_END_RAW_MIN WHEN awReqRaw.REQ_END_RAW_MIN <= awReqRaw.REQ_START_MIN THEN awReqRaw.REQ_END_RAW_MIN + 1440 ELSE awReqRaw.REQ_END_RAW_MIN END AS REQ_END_MIN ) awReqRange WHERE awar.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND awar.TARGET_EMP_CODE = h.EMP_CODE AND awar.TARGET_DATE = awd.WORK_DATE AND awar.REQ_GROUP = 'GENERAL' AND awar.STATUS = 'APPROVED' ) actualEffect ) awActualReq CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE WHEN awClip.WORK_START_MIN IS NOT NULL AND awClip.WORK_END_MIN IS NOT NULL AND awClip.WORK_END_MIN > awClip.WORK_START_MIN THEN awClip.WORK_END_MIN - awClip.WORK_START_MIN - ISNULL(awBreak.BREAK_MIN, 0) WHEN awa.WORK_MIN IS NOT NULL AND ISNULL(awPlan.PLAN_WORK_MIN, 0) > 0 THEN CASE WHEN awa.WORK_MIN > awPlan.PLAN_WORK_MIN THEN awPlan.PLAN_WORK_MIN ELSE awa.WORK_MIN END ELSE 0 END AS BASE_ACTUAL_MIN ) awBaseActual CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE WHEN awd.WORK_DATE > CAST(#{today} AS DATE) THEN 0 ELSE (CASE WHEN ISNULL(awBaseActual.BASE_ACTUAL_MIN, 0) + ISNULL(awActualReq.ACTUAL_EFFECT_MIN, 0) < 0 THEN 0 ELSE ISNULL(awBaseActual.BASE_ACTUAL_MIN, 0) + ISNULL(awActualReq.ACTUAL_EFFECT_MIN, 0) END) - (ISNULL(awPlan.PLAN_WORK_MIN, 0) + ISNULL(awExpectedReq.REQUEST_EFFECT_MIN, 0)) END AS ADJ_MIN ) dayAdj ) weeklyActualAdj LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r ON h.COMPANY = r.COMPANY AND h.EMP_CODE = r.TARGET_EMP_CODE AND r.TARGET_DATE = CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE) AND r.STATUS <> 'CANCELED' LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 g ON r.COMPANY = g.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = g.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 o ON r.COMPANY = o.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = o.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRIMASTER01 re ON r.COMPANY = re.COMPANY AND r.REQUESTER_EMP_CODE = re.EMP_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTDAILYATTENDANCE01 ar ON h.COMPANY = ar.COMPANY AND h.EMP_CODE = ar.EMP_CODE AND ar.YYYYMMDD = REPLACE(#{workDate}, '-', '') LEFT JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 actualShift ON actualShift.COMPANY = h.COMPANY AND actualShift.SHIFT_CODE = COALESCE(NULLIF(ar.ACTUAL_SHIFT_CODE, ''), NULLIF(ar.SHIFT_CODE, ''), s.SHIFT_CODE) WHERE h.COMPANY = #{company} AND h.DEPT_CODE = #{deptCode} AND h.RETIRE_DATE IS NULL
AND h.EMP_CODE = #{loginEmpCode}
AND CASE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) WHEN 'WEEKDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'ANYDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'WEEKEND' THEN 'OFF' ELSE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) END IN ('OFF', 'HOLIDAY')
AND (CASE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) WHEN 'WEEKDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'ANYDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'WEEKEND' THEN 'OFF' ELSE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) END IS NULL OR CASE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) WHEN 'WEEKDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'ANYDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'WEEKEND' THEN 'OFF' ELSE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) END NOT IN ('OFF', 'HOLIDAY'))
AND h.EMP_CODE = #{empCode}
AND s.SHIFT_CODE = #{workPlanFilter}
ORDER BY h.EMP_CODE

SELECT r.COMPANY AS company, r.REQ_ID AS requestId, r.TARGET_EMP_CODE AS empCode, r.TARGET_DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), r.TARGET_DATE, 23) AS workDate, r.REQ_GROUP AS requestCategory, CASE WHEN r.REQ_GROUP = 'OTHER' THEN o.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE ELSE r.REQ_TYPE END AS requestWorkCode, r.REASON AS reason, r.REASON_DETAIL AS reasonDetail, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.START_TIME, 108), 5) AS startTime, ISNULL(g.START_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') AS startTimeType, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.END_TIME, 108), 5) AS endTime, ISNULL(g.END_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') AS endTimeType, r.STATUS AS status, r.REQUESTER_EMP_CODE AS requesterCode FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 g ON r.COMPANY = g.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = g.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 o ON r.COMPANY = o.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = o.REQ_ID WHERE r.REQ_ID = #{requestId}

SELECT r.REQ_ID AS requestId, CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), r.TARGET_DATE, 23) AS targetDate, r.REQ_TYPE AS reqType, r.REQ_GROUP AS reqGroup, r.REASON AS reason, r.REASON_DETAIL AS reasonDetail, r.STATUS AS requestStatus, te.EMP_CODE AS targetEmpCode, te.EMP_NAME AS targetEmpName, td.DEPT_NAME AS targetDeptName, re.EMP_CODE AS requesterEmpCode, re.EMP_NAME AS requesterEmpName, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.START_TIME, 108), 5) AS startTime, ISNULL(g.START_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') AS startTimeType, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), g.END_TIME, 108), 5) AS endTime, ISNULL(g.END_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') AS endTimeType, o.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE AS changeShiftCode, s.SHIFT_NAME AS changeShiftName, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), ar.CHECK_IN, 108), 5) AS recordCheckIn, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), ar.CHECK_OUT, 108), 5) AS recordCheckOut, ar.WORK_MIN AS recordWorkMin, ar.OVERNIGHT_YN AS recordOvernightYn, ar.LATE_YN AS recordLateYn, ar.LATE_MIN AS recordLateMin FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r JOIN HRIMASTER01 te ON r.COMPANY = te.COMPANY AND r.TARGET_EMP_CODE = te.EMP_CODE LEFT JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 td ON te.COMPANY = td.COMPANY AND te.DEPT_CODE = td.DEPT_CODE JOIN HRIMASTER01 re ON r.COMPANY = re.COMPANY AND r.REQUESTER_EMP_CODE = re.EMP_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 g ON r.COMPANY = g.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = g.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 o ON r.COMPANY = o.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = o.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON r.COMPANY = s.COMPANY AND o.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE = s.SHIFT_CODE LEFT JOIN HRTDAILYATTENDANCE01 ar ON r.COMPANY = ar.COMPANY AND r.TARGET_EMP_CODE = ar.EMP_CODE AND ar.YYYYMMDD = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), r.TARGET_DATE, 112) WHERE r.REQ_ID = #{requestId} AND r.COMPANY = #{company}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 ( COMPANY, REQ_ID, REQ_GROUP, REQ_TYPE, REQUESTER_EMP_CODE, TARGET_EMP_CODE, REQUESTER_DEPT_CODE, TARGET_DEPT_CODE, TARGET_DATE, REASON, REASON_DETAIL, STATUS, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{company}, #{requestId}, CASE WHEN #{requestCategory} = 'OTHER' THEN 'OTHER' ELSE 'GENERAL' END, CASE WHEN #{requestCategory} = 'OTHER' THEN 'SHIFT_CHANGE' ELSE #{requestWorkCode} END, #{requesterCode}, #{empCode}, #{requesterDeptCode}, #{deptCode}, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE), #{reason}, #{reasonDetail}, #{status}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )

INSERT INTO HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 ( COMPANY, REQ_ID, START_TIME, START_TIME_TYPE, END_TIME, END_TIME_TYPE, WORK_MIN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{company}, #{requestId}, CAST(#{startTime} AS TIME), #{startTimeType}, CAST(#{endTime} AS TIME), #{endTimeType}, #{requestWorkMin}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )

INSERT INTO HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 ( COMPANY, REQ_ID, CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE, START_DATE, END_DATE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{company}, #{requestId}, #{requestWorkCode}, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE), CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE), GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 SET REQ_TYPE = CASE WHEN REQ_GROUP = 'OTHER' THEN 'SHIFT_CHANGE' ELSE #{requestWorkCode} END, REASON = #{reason}, REASON_DETAIL = #{reasonDetail}, STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHERE REQ_ID = #{requestId} AND COMPANY = #{company}

UPDATE HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 SET START_TIME = CAST(#{startTime} AS TIME), START_TIME_TYPE = #{startTimeType}, END_TIME = CAST(#{endTime} AS TIME), END_TIME_TYPE = #{endTimeType}, WORK_MIN = #{requestWorkMin}, UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHERE REQ_ID = #{requestId} AND COMPANY = #{company}
UPDATE HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 SET STATUS = #{status}, UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHERE REQ_ID = #{requestId}

MERGE HRTDAILYATTENDANCE01 AS T USING ( SELECT r.COMPANY, r.TARGET_EMP_CODE AS EMP_CODE, CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), r.TARGET_DATE, 112) AS YYYYMMDD, r.TARGET_DEPT_CODE AS DEPT_CODE, o.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_OTHER01 o ON r.COMPANY = o.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = o.REQ_ID WHERE r.REQ_ID = #{requestId} AND r.REQ_GROUP = 'OTHER' AND r.STATUS = 'APPROVED' ) AS S ON T.COMPANY = S.COMPANY AND T.EMP_CODE = S.EMP_CODE AND T.YYYYMMDD = S.YYYYMMDD WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET ACTUAL_SHIFT_CODE = S.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE, UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (COMPANY, EMP_CODE, YYYYMMDD, DEPT_CODE, SHIFT_CODE, ACTUAL_SHIFT_CODE, WORK_MIN, OVERNIGHT_YN, LATE_YN, LATE_MIN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT) VALUES (S.COMPANY, S.EMP_CODE, S.YYYYMMDD, S.DEPT_CODE, NULL, S.CHANGE_SHIFT_CODE, 0, 'N', 'N', 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE());
mapper.select: SELECT DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, DEPT_NAME AS deptName FROM ORGDEPTMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DEPT_CODE

SELECT SHIFT_CODE AS shiftCode, SHIFT_NAME AS shiftName, WORK_DAY_TYPE AS workDayType, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), WORK_ON_HHMM, 108) AS workOnHhmm, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), WORK_OFF_HHMM, 108) AS workOffHhmm, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), BREAK1_START_HHMM, 108) AS break1StartHhmm, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), BREAK1_END_HHMM, 108) AS break1EndHhmm, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), BREAK2_START_HHMM, 108) AS break2StartHhmm, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), BREAK2_END_HHMM, 108) AS break2EndHhmm, CASE WHEN WORK_ON_HHMM IS NOT NULL AND WORK_OFF_HHMM IS NOT NULL THEN (CASE WHEN WORK_OFF_HHMM >= WORK_ON_HHMM THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, WORK_ON_HHMM, WORK_OFF_HHMM) ELSE 1440 + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, WORK_ON_HHMM, WORK_OFF_HHMM) END - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, BREAK1_START_HHMM, BREAK1_END_HHMM), 0) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, BREAK2_START_HHMM, BREAK2_END_HHMM), 0)) ELSE 0 END AS workMinutes FROM HRTSHIFTMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_SEQ, SHIFT_CODE

SELECT LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), s.WORK_ON_HHMM, 108), 5) AS workOnHhmm, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), s.WORK_OFF_HHMM, 108), 5) AS workOffHhmm, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), s.BREAK1_START_HHMM, 108), 5) AS break1StartHhmm, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), s.BREAK1_END_HHMM, 108), 5) AS break1EndHhmm, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), s.BREAK2_START_HHMM, 108), 5) AS break2StartHhmm, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), s.BREAK2_END_HHMM, 108), 5) AS break2EndHhmm FROM HRIDEPTTRANSFER01 tr JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 dept ON dept.COMPANY = #{company} AND dept.DEPT_CODE = tr.DEPT_CODE JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 pm ON pm.COMPANY = dept.COMPANY AND pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = dept.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pm.USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 pd ON pd.COMPANY = pm.COMPANY AND pd.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pd.SEQ = ( (DATEDIFF(DAY, pm.START_DATE, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + pm.CYCLE_COUNT) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + 1 ) JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON s.COMPANY = pd.COMPANY AND s.SHIFT_CODE = pd.SHIFT_CODE WHERE tr.COMPANY = #{company} AND tr.EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND tr.START_DATE <= CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE) AND (tr.END_DATE IS NULL OR tr.END_DATE >= CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) AND s.WORK_ON_HHMM IS NOT NULL AND s.WORK_OFF_HHMM IS NOT NULL

SELECT LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), WORK_ON_HHMM, 108), 5) AS workOnHhmm, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), WORK_OFF_HHMM, 108), 5) AS workOffHhmm, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), BREAK1_START_HHMM, 108), 5) AS break1StartHhmm, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), BREAK1_END_HHMM, 108), 5) AS break1EndHhmm, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), BREAK2_START_HHMM, 108), 5) AS break2StartHhmm, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), BREAK2_END_HHMM, 108), 5) AS break2EndHhmm FROM HRTSHIFTMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND (SHIFT_CODE = #{shiftCodeOrName} OR SHIFT_NAME = #{shiftCodeOrName})

SELECT CASE WHEN ot.earlyStartMin IS NOT NULL AND ot.earlyStartMin < base.baseStartMin THEN ot.earlyStartMin ELSE base.baseStartMin END AS effectiveStartMin, CASE WHEN ot.lateEndMin IS NOT NULL AND ot.lateEndMin > base.baseEndMin THEN ot.lateEndMin ELSE base.baseEndMin END AS effectiveEndMin FROM ( SELECT DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), s.WORK_ON_HHMM) AS baseStartMin, CASE WHEN s.WORK_OFF_HHMM >= s.WORK_ON_HHMM THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), s.WORK_OFF_HHMM) ELSE 1440 + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), s.WORK_OFF_HHMM) END AS baseEndMin FROM HRIDEPTTRANSFER01 tr JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 dept ON dept.COMPANY = #{company} AND dept.DEPT_CODE = tr.DEPT_CODE JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 pm ON pm.COMPANY = dept.COMPANY AND pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = dept.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pm.USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 pd ON pd.COMPANY = pm.COMPANY AND pd.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pd.SEQ = ( (DATEDIFF(DAY, pm.START_DATE, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + pm.CYCLE_COUNT) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + 1 ) JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON s.COMPANY = pd.COMPANY AND s.SHIFT_CODE = pd.SHIFT_CODE WHERE tr.COMPANY = #{company} AND tr.EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND tr.START_DATE <= CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE) AND (tr.END_DATE IS NULL OR tr.END_DATE >= CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) AND s.WORK_ON_HHMM IS NOT NULL AND s.WORK_OFF_HHMM IS NOT NULL ) base OUTER APPLY ( SELECT MIN(CASE WHEN r.REQ_TYPE = '조출연장' THEN (CASE WHEN ISNULL(g.START_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') = 'N1' THEN 1440 ELSE 0 END + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), g.START_TIME)) END) AS earlyStartMin, MAX(CASE WHEN r.REQ_TYPE = '연장' THEN (CASE WHEN ISNULL(g.END_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') = 'N1' THEN 1440 ELSE 0 END + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), g.END_TIME)) END) AS lateEndMin FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 g ON r.COMPANY = g.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = g.REQ_ID WHERE r.COMPANY = #{company} AND r.TARGET_EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND r.TARGET_DATE = CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE) AND r.STATUS IN ('DRAFT', 'SUBMITTED', 'APPROVED') AND r.REQ_GROUP = 'GENERAL' AND r.REQ_TYPE IN ('연장', '조출연장') AND (#{requestId} IS NULL OR #{requestId} = '' OR r.REQ_ID <> #{requestId}) ) ot

SELECT LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CHECK_IN, 108), 5) AS checkIn, LEFT(CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), CHECK_OUT, 108), 5) AS checkOut, OVERNIGHT_YN AS overnightYn, WORK_MIN AS workMin FROM HRTDAILYATTENDANCE01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND YYYYMMDD = REPLACE(#{workDate}, '-', '')

WITH BASE AS ( SELECT DATEADD(DAY, -((DATEDIFF(DAY, 0, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) % 7 + 7) % 7), CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) AS WEEK_START ), WEEK_DAYS AS ( SELECT DATEADD(DAY, days.n, BASE.WEEK_START) AS WORK_DATE, days.n AS DAY_OFFSET FROM BASE CROSS JOIN (VALUES(0),(1),(2),(3),(4),(5),(6)) AS days(n) ), DAILY_WORK AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN ar.CHECK_IN IS NOT NULL AND ar.CHECK_OUT IS NULL THEN CASE WHEN s.WORK_ON_HHMM IS NULL OR s.WORK_OFF_HHMM IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN ISNULL(day_type.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '') IN ('OFF', 'HOLIDAY') THEN 0 WHEN s.WORK_OFF_HHMM >= s.WORK_ON_HHMM THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, s.WORK_ON_HHMM, s.WORK_OFF_HHMM) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, s.BREAK1_START_HHMM, s.BREAK1_END_HHMM), 0) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, s.BREAK2_START_HHMM, s.BREAK2_END_HHMM), 0) ELSE 1440 + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, s.WORK_ON_HHMM, s.WORK_OFF_HHMM) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, s.BREAK1_START_HHMM, s.BREAK1_END_HHMM), 0) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, s.BREAK2_START_HHMM, s.BREAK2_END_HHMM), 0) END WHEN ar.WORK_MIN IS NOT NULL THEN ar.WORK_MIN WHEN wd.WORK_DATE < CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE) THEN 0 WHEN s.WORK_ON_HHMM IS NULL OR s.WORK_OFF_HHMM IS NULL THEN 0 WHEN ISNULL(day_type.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '') IN ('OFF', 'HOLIDAY') THEN 0 WHEN s.WORK_OFF_HHMM >= s.WORK_ON_HHMM THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, s.WORK_ON_HHMM, s.WORK_OFF_HHMM) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, s.BREAK1_START_HHMM, s.BREAK1_END_HHMM), 0) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, s.BREAK2_START_HHMM, s.BREAK2_END_HHMM), 0) ELSE 1440 + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, s.WORK_ON_HHMM, s.WORK_OFF_HHMM) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, s.BREAK1_START_HHMM, s.BREAK1_END_HHMM), 0) - ISNULL(DATEDIFF(MINUTE, s.BREAK2_START_HHMM, s.BREAK2_END_HHMM), 0) END AS WORK_MIN FROM WEEK_DAYS wd JOIN HRIDEPTTRANSFER01 tr ON tr.COMPANY = #{company} AND tr.EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND tr.START_DATE <= wd.WORK_DATE AND (tr.END_DATE IS NULL OR tr.END_DATE >= wd.WORK_DATE) JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 dept ON dept.COMPANY = #{company} AND dept.DEPT_CODE = tr.DEPT_CODE JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 pm ON pm.COMPANY = dept.COMPANY AND pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = dept.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pm.USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 pd ON pd.COMPANY = pm.COMPANY AND pd.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pd.SEQ = ( (DATEDIFF(DAY, pm.START_DATE, wd.WORK_DATE) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + pm.CYCLE_COUNT) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + 1 ) JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON s.COMPANY = pd.COMPANY AND s.SHIFT_CODE = pd.SHIFT_CODE CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) WHEN 'WEEKDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'ANYDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'WEEKEND' THEN 'OFF' ELSE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) END AS WORK_DAY_TYPE ) day_type LEFT JOIN HRTDAILYATTENDANCE01 ar ON tr.COMPANY = ar.COMPANY AND tr.EMP_CODE = ar.EMP_CODE AND ar.YYYYMMDD = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), wd.WORK_DATE, 112) ) SELECT ISNULL(SUM(WORK_MIN), 0) FROM DAILY_WORK

WITH BASE AS ( SELECT DATEADD(DAY, -((DATEDIFF(DAY, 0, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) % 7 + 7) % 7), CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) AS WEEK_START ) SELECT ISNULL(SUM( CASE WHEN r.REQ_TYPE IN ('연장', '조출연장', '휴일근무') THEN CASE WHEN ISNULL(g.WORK_MIN, 0) > 0 THEN ISNULL(g.WORK_MIN, 0) ELSE 0 END WHEN r.REQ_TYPE IN ('조퇴', '외근', '외출', '오전반차', '오후반차') THEN -ISNULL(g.WORK_MIN, 0) ELSE 0 END ), 0) FROM HRTATTENDANCEREQUEST01 r JOIN HRTATTENDANCE_GENERAL01 g ON r.COMPANY = g.COMPANY AND r.REQ_ID = g.REQ_ID LEFT JOIN HRTDAILYATTENDANCE01 ar ON ar.COMPANY = r.COMPANY AND ar.EMP_CODE = r.TARGET_EMP_CODE AND ar.YYYYMMDD = CONVERT(VARCHAR(8), r.TARGET_DATE, 112) CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE WHEN ISNULL(g.START_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') = 'N1' THEN 1440 ELSE 0 END + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), g.START_TIME) AS REQ_START_MIN, CASE WHEN ISNULL(g.END_TIME_TYPE, 'N0') = 'N1' THEN 1440 ELSE 0 END + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), g.END_TIME) AS REQ_END_MIN ) reqRange CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE WHEN ar.CHECK_IN IS NULL OR ar.CHECK_OUT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), ar.CHECK_IN) END AS ACTUAL_START_MIN, CASE WHEN ar.CHECK_IN IS NULL OR ar.CHECK_OUT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE CASE WHEN ISNULL(ar.OVERNIGHT_YN, 'N') = 'Y' THEN 1440 ELSE 0 END + DATEDIFF(MINUTE, CAST('00:00' AS TIME), ar.CHECK_OUT) END AS ACTUAL_END_MIN ) actualRange CROSS APPLY ( SELECT CASE WHEN actualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN IS NULL OR actualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN IS NULL OR reqRange.REQ_END_MIN <= actualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN OR actualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN <= reqRange.REQ_START_MIN THEN 0 ELSE CASE WHEN (CASE WHEN reqRange.REQ_END_MIN < actualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN THEN reqRange.REQ_END_MIN ELSE actualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN END) - (CASE WHEN reqRange.REQ_START_MIN > actualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN THEN reqRange.REQ_START_MIN ELSE actualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN END) > 0 THEN (CASE WHEN reqRange.REQ_END_MIN < actualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN THEN reqRange.REQ_END_MIN ELSE actualRange.ACTUAL_END_MIN END) - (CASE WHEN reqRange.REQ_START_MIN > actualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN THEN reqRange.REQ_START_MIN ELSE actualRange.ACTUAL_START_MIN END) ELSE 0 END END AS OVERLAP_MIN ) actualOverlap CROSS JOIN BASE WHERE r.COMPANY = #{company} AND r.TARGET_EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND r.TARGET_DATE BETWEEN BASE.WEEK_START AND DATEADD(DAY, 6, BASE.WEEK_START) AND r.STATUS IN ('DRAFT', 'SUBMITTED', 'APPROVED') AND r.REQ_GROUP = 'GENERAL'
AND r.REQ_ID <> #{requestId}

SELECT CASE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) WHEN 'WEEKDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'ANYDAY' THEN 'WORK' WHEN 'WEEKEND' THEN 'OFF' ELSE ISNULL(pd.WORK_DAY_TYPE, ISNULL(s.WORK_DAY_TYPE, '')) END FROM HRIDEPTTRANSFER01 tr JOIN ORGDEPTMASTER01 dept ON dept.COMPANY = #{company} AND dept.DEPT_CODE = tr.DEPT_CODE JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 pm ON pm.COMPANY = dept.COMPANY AND pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = dept.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pm.USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 pd ON pd.COMPANY = pm.COMPANY AND pd.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = pm.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AND pd.SEQ = ( (DATEDIFF(DAY, pm.START_DATE, CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE)) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + pm.CYCLE_COUNT) % pm.CYCLE_COUNT + 1 ) JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 s ON s.COMPANY = pd.COMPANY AND s.SHIFT_CODE = pd.SHIFT_CODE WHERE tr.COMPANY = #{company} AND tr.EMP_CODE = #{empCode} AND tr.START_DATE <= CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE) AND (tr.END_DATE IS NULL OR tr.END_DATE >= CAST(#{workDate} AS DATE))

WITH SubDepts AS ( SELECT DEPT_CODE, DEPT_NAME FROM ORGDEPTMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND DEPT_CODE = #{deptCode} AND USE_YN = 'Y' UNION ALL SELECT d.DEPT_CODE, d.DEPT_NAME FROM ORGDEPTMASTER01 d INNER JOIN SubDepts s ON d.PARENT_DEPT = s.DEPT_CODE WHERE d.COMPANY = #{company} AND d.USE_YN = 'Y' ) SELECT DEPT_CODE AS deptCode, DEPT_NAME AS deptName FROM SubDepts ORDER BY DEPT_CODE OPTION (MAXRECURSION 20)
